sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n535" key="a)gk" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγκ-</orth>, Poet. abbrev. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνακ-</foreign> in compds. of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνά.</foreign> </entryFree>
